---
description: "Use this prompt to instruct Makuco Specify Agent to create or update a feature specification from a natural language description"
agent: makuco-specify
---

Read the feature description below and follow the agent workflow strictly, step by step. Use your skills, tools and the knowledge chain to produce a complete and accurate specification.

Deliver the specification fully populated — no placeholder sections left blank — and report any blocking decisions or ambiguities that require user clarification before the spec can be considered done.

Mandatory: Elicit requirements through the makuco-business-analyst agent before writing the spec. Do not skip this step.

## Feature Description
